title: Flightning99's Crafting Tweaks
description: A variety of crafting tweaks I enjoy using in my worlds
body:
The datapack I use to add custom recipes to my worlds, plus a little extra!

Crafting Table
- Bone to Bone Blocks
- Craftable Calcite
- Prismarine Bricks to Dark Prismarine
- Muddy Magrove Roots to Mud Blocks
- Duplicate Sand using Gravel
- Duplicate Red Sand using Sand
- Snow Layers to Snow Block
- Convert Torches into Copper Torches
- Green Dye from Blue and Yellow Dyes
- Magenta Dye from Purple, Red, and White Dyes
- Brown Dye from complementary colors
  - Red and Green, Blue and Orange, and Yellow and Purple
- Brown Dye from Red, Blue, and Yellow Dyes
- Black Dye from Cyan, Magenta, and Yellow Dyes
- Black Dye from Charcoal
- White Dye from White Tulip
- Dye Mixing expanded to use new Dye Recipes
  - Cyan Dye can be split into Blue and Green Dyes
    - Green Dye can be further split into Blue and Yellow Dyes
  - Black Dye can be split into Cyan, Magenta, and Yellow Dyes
    - Cyan Dye can be further split into its ingredients
    - Magenta Dye can be further split into its ingredients

Campfire
- Rotten Flesh to Rabbit Hide

A Little Extra!
- Custom "Suzu" Painting added
  - Can be placed randomly or be picked in a Stonecutter
  - Requires "Flightning99's Suzu" Resource Pack
